results.title: Iran Claims It Shot Down US MQ-9 Drone Over Ahvaz
results.description: (MENAFN) Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said it downed a US MQ-9 drone over the southwestern city of Ahvaz on Sunday, according to reports.The claim has not been confirmed by US ...

results.title: US-Saudi-Emirati crimes aggression on this day, July 19
results.description: On this day, July 19, the airstrikes of the US-Saudi-Emirati aggression concentrated on residential neighborhoods and public facilities, resulting in dozens of martyrs and wounded, as well as widespread destruction.

results.title: A better Bangladesh for all
results.description: Prime Minister Tarique Rahman’s assurance that no one will be left behind in building a new Bangladesh is definitely a powerful commitment, and one that must be heeded. This is a statement that carries particular weight for our nation’s minority population, who have too often lived at the margins of development, protection, and political attention.
